title: Penalty for violations
doc_html:
§1204.  Penalty for violations

Whoever violates the provisions of this Sub-part shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars nor more than one hundred dollars or imprisoned for not less than five days nor more than thirty days, or both.
doc_text:
§1204.  Penalty for violations
Whoever violates the provisions of this Sub-part shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars nor more than one hundred dollars or imprisoned for not less than five days nor more than thirty days, or both.
